allow: PowerShell($exe = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Packages\\GodotEngine.GodotEngine_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe\\Godot_v4.6.3-stable_win64.exe"; Start-Process -FilePath $exe -ArgumentList '--editor','--path','D:\\PROJETOS CLAUDE\\GAME'; Write-Output "Godot iniciado apontando para o projeto.")

PowerShell($exe = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Packages\\GodotEngine.GodotEngine_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe\\Godot_v4.6.3-stable_win64_console.exe"; $err = "D:\\PROJETOS CLAUDE\\GAME\\godot_launch_err.log"; $out = "D:\\PROJETOS CLAUDE\\GAME\\godot_launch_out.log"; $p = Start-Process -FilePath $exe -ArgumentList '--path','D:\\PROJETOS CLAUDE\\GAME','--editor' -PassThru -RedirectStandardError $err -RedirectStandardOutput $out; Write-Output "PID lancado: $\($p.Id\)"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; $alive = Get-Process -Id $p.Id -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($alive\){ Write-Output "VIVO apos 10s \(PID $\($p.Id\)\)" } else { Write-Output "MORREU em <10s. ExitCode: $\($p.ExitCode\)" })

PowerShell($exe = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Packages\\GodotEngine.GodotEngine_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe\\Godot_v4.6.3-stable_win64.exe"; $p = Start-Process -FilePath $exe -ArgumentList '--path','"D:\\PROJETOS CLAUDE\\GAME"','--editor' -PassThru; Write-Output "PID: $\($p.Id\). Aguardando porta 9080..."; $deadline=\(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(90\); $up=$false; while\(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\){ if\(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 9080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\){ $up=$true; break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3 }; $alive = Get-Process -Id $p.Id -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($up\){ Write-Output "OK: porta 9080 ESCUTANDO. Godot PID $\($p.Id\) vivo=$\([bool]$alive\). MCP pronto!" } else { Write-Output "Porta nao subiu. Godot vivo=$\([bool]$alive\)" })
